description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof clad in light wood, extending over a covered front porch. The exterior walls are finished in white, with wooden accents around the entryway and porch columns. The front facade includes a central entrance flanked by a window, while the rear and side elevations are more minimal, with fewer openings. The house sits on a rectangular green base, suggesting a lawn or yard, and is bordered by a partial white fence on one side. The roof overhangs provide shade and architectural interest, and the overall design is compact and functional. The visible materials and proportions evoke a modern take on traditional bungalow forms.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a light wood gable roof, covered front porch, and minimalistic window arrangement, set on a green base with partial fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entrance, and a window to the right of the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the gable roof, partial fencing, and some texture references on the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain white walls, minimal window openings, and the roof's overhang visible.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing a secondary entrance or porch area and large window panels.
